vision.response: A man in a suit and tie is sitting at a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard in front of him.
vision.notes: 1st request: model hallucinated generic office description — image not delivered to model (#new-token=121 is too low for 256x256 to be image-tokenized). 2nd image request crashed the SGLang MLX bridge (known issue: MLX VLM crashes in the bridge). Contradicts README 'Image working end-to-end' claim; surface this in Known Issues.
